selected_strategies.reason: launch date falls in the US summer vacation window and occasion tags align to vacation demand

retrieved_elements.evidence_summary: Frequent in easy summer dresses with broad commercial appeal.
Supports crisp but lightweight warm-weather dresses.
Common neckline direction for feminine vacation dressing.
Reliable V-neck option for transitional dress coverage beyond summer vacation use.
Adds light movement suited to resort and summer styling.
Reliable pattern for summer vacation demand and must-have tag tests.
Adds wearable comfort without complicating the MVP composition path.

constraint_notes: style compatibility penalty applied: floral print + smocked bodice (0.08)

prompt_bundle.prompt:
[商品主体] women's vacation dress for the US market, on-model ecommerce hero image, product-first presentation
[核心结构] a-line silhouette; cotton poplin fabric; square neckline; flutter sleeve; floral print; smocked bodice; non-bodycon fit
[生产与细节展示要求] clearly show neckline depth, bodice construction, sleeve opening, waist seam position, skirt volume, hem finish, floral print scale, and fabric texture; keep the garment visually realistic and feasible for factory production; seasonal direction: launch date falls in the US summer vacation window and occasion tags align to vacation demand
[镜头与构图] full-body; vertical 4:5; eye-level camera; centered composition; full dress visible from shoulder to hem; clean negative space
[面料与工艺表现] crisp cotton poplin texture; visible smocked bodice; visible seam lines; clean hem finish; true-to-color floral print; natural drape; commercially realistic construction
[场景与光线] clean sunlit resort-inspired studio; soft directional daylight; warm ivory and sand background; minimal props
[约束与避免项] no bodycon fit; no text; no watermark; no cluttered background; no unrealistic garment construction; no jacket; no cardigan; no bag covering the bodice; no exaggerated editorial pose

detail_prompts.prompt: close-up ecommerce detail image of the square neckline, smocked bodice, and flutter sleeve on the dress; clearly show seam lines, neckline edge finish, print placement, and true-to-color floral print; neutral studio background; no hands, no accessories, no text

macro fabric detail image of cotton poplin with floral print; clearly show print scale, weave texture, color accuracy, and commercially realistic construction; soft studio lighting; no blur, no props, no text

close-up lower-skirt detail image of the a-line dress; clearly show hem finish, skirt volume, seam transitions, drape, and floral print continuity; neutral background; no cropped hem edge, no props, no text

fit_intent: a-line silhouette supports easy skirt volume and commercial mobility
smocked bodice should keep waist shaping flexible rather than restrictive
fabric_review_focus: confirm crisp texture, opacity, and print clarity for cotton poplin
check drape stays light and controlled rather than clingy
detail_review_focus: verify smocking stitch consistency, recovery, and clean attachment
confirm bodice tension stays even without distorting print placement
commercial_review_context: seasonal review context: launch date falls in the US summer vacation window and occasion tags align to vacation demand
occasion review context: align construction readability to vacation use
price-band review context: keep construction commercially realistic for mid pricing
